name: Aave V3 Health-Factor Manager
description: Monitor Aave V3 borrow positions and auto-deleverage before liquidation. Watches healthFactor in real time and, when below threshold, repays a portion of the debt OR withdraws less-needed collateral to restore safety. One avoided liquidation can save $500-5000.
use_case: Your agent borrows USDC against ETH collateral. ETH price drops 15%. Without this skill: liquidation = ~5% penalty. With this skill: agent auto-repays before liquidation triggers.

verification.criteria: Verifier asserts target tx called Pool.repay() with onBehalfOf == agent, AND post-tx healthFactor > pre-tx healthFactor.
